GONGYE LIU'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Internship

Gongye Liu (刘功烨)

Ph.D. Student @HKUST, Hong Kong

Contact: gongyeliuu@gmail.com

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub / CV

About Me

Hi, I'm Gongye Liu, a first-year Ph.D. student at The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST), supervised by Prof. Wenhan Luo (main) and Prof. Hongbo Fu.

Prior to that, I obtained my M.Sc degree(2022-2025) in Artificial Intelligence from Tsinghua University, supervised by Professor Yujiu Yang. I received my B.Eng degree(2018-2022) in Beihang University.

I am working on Generative AI, with a focus on diffusion/flow-matching models for images and videos. My interests include foundation models, post-training techniques, and controllable generation.

Education

The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
Ph.D. Student in Individualized Interdisciplinary Program (IIP)
Main Supervisor: Prof. Wenhan Luo, Co-Supervisor: Prof. Hongbo Fu
Sep. 2025 - Present
Tsinghua University

Supervisor: Prof. Yujiu Yang
Sep. 2022 - Jun. 2025

Bachelor Degree in Aircraft Control and Information Engineering

{"messageId":"019ce0b46c877b2e8b0225046def72ab","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0b46c877b2e8b0225046def72ab","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"文件已经成功创建。以下是对新 [index.html](/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html) 的设计说明：

## 复刻的设计要素

### 视觉风格
- **暗色主题**：深色背景 `rgb(34, 39, 44)`，与原站一致
- **配色方案**：完全复刻了原站的 CSS 变量系统 — 蓝色标题 `rgb(23, 165, 236)`、橙色高亮 `#ffac4d`、蓝色链接 `#3098ff`
- **字体**：使用 `Lato` 字体（在线加载），与原站一致

### 页面结构
1. **Hero 全屏首屏**：居中头像、姓名、标题、导航链接、社交链接 + 底部滚动箭头动画
2. **吸顶导航栏**：毛玻璃效果 (`backdrop-filter: blur`)，包含 Home 图标 + 各 Section 导航
3. **About 区域**：左侧头像 + 右侧个人信息的横向布局
4. **Education 区域**：学校 Logo + 学位信息 + 日期的列表布局（已关联你的 `educations/pku.png` 和 `educations/BUAA.png`）
5. **Publications 区域**：论文卡片（图片悬停切换效果）+ 过滤气泡标签 + GitHub Stars/引用量自动抓取
6. **Career 区域**：实习经历列表
7. **Footer**：自动显示最后更新日期

### ✨ 交互效果
- **首屏吸附滚动**：滚动超过 30px 自动平滑跳到 About 区域
- **链接下划线动效**：鼠标悬停时橙色下划线从左到右滑入
- **论文图片切换**：悬停时静态图和动态图交叉淡入淡出
- **论文过滤**：气泡按钮筛选 + 瀑布流渐入动画
- **滚动箭头弹跳**：首屏底部持续弹跳动画

### 响应式
- 适配移动端：小屏幕下各 Section 切换为垂直布局

所有 CSS 和 JS 均内联在单个 HTML 文件中，无需额外依赖，直接打开浏览器即可查看效果。你的个人信息（北京大学、北航、AlignedGen 论文、腾讯微信实习等）已全部填入。"},"timestamp":1773296796,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

About Education Publications Career
E-mail Scholar GitHub
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang (张杰轩)

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

'dark' : 'light';\\n if (next === 'light') {\\n document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light');\\n } else {\\n document.documentElement.removeAttribute('data-theme');\\n }\\n localStorage.setItem('theme', next);\\n });\\n })();\\n </script>\\n\\n <script>\\n // 首屏吸附滚动效果\\n document.addEventListener(\\\"DOMContentLoaded\\\", function() {\\n let isSnapping = false;\\n let hasScrolledPastHero = false;\\n\\n window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {\\n const scrollY = window.scrollY;\\n const heroHeight = window.innerHeight;\\n\\n if (scrollY > 30 && scrollY < heroHeight / 2 && !isSnapping && !hasScrolledPastHero) {\\n isSnapping = true;\\n hasScrolledPastHero = true;\\n document.getElementById('about').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\\n setTimeout(() => { isSnapping = false; }, 800);\\n } else if (scrollY === 0) {\\n hasScrolledPastHero = false;\\n isSnapping = false;\\n }\\n });\\n });\\n </script>\\n</body>\\n</html>\\n... {"messageId":"019ce0bd5869795c83cd00932ecc6bbe","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0bd5869795c83cd00932ecc6bbe","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"所有修改都已正确应用！总结一下完成的改动：

---

### ✅ 整体字体调大

| 元素 | 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|------|
| `body` 基础字号 | 16px | **18px** |
| `.name` | 32px | **34px** |
| `.section-title` | 26px | **28px** |
| `.item-title` | 16px | **17px** |
| `.list-date` | 15px | **16px** |
| `.pub-title` | 17px | **18px** |
| `.pub-authors` / `.pub-venue` | 15px | **16px** |
| `.pub-desc` | 14px | **15px** |
| `.pub-stat` | 13px | **14px** |
| `.filter-btn` | 14px | **15px** |
| `footer` | 14px | **15px** |
| `.hero-name` | 36px | **38px** |
| `.hero-title` | 16px | **17px** |
| `.hero-subtitle` / `.hero-contact` | 15px | **16px** |
| `.hero-nav a` | 17px | **18px** |
| `.hero-socials a` | 14px | **15px** |
| `.nav-links a` | 14px | **15px** |

### ✅ 白色/黑色主题切换

- 在吸顶导航栏右侧新增了一个 **/☀️ 主题切换按钮**
- 默认为 **暗色主题**（黑色背景），点击按钮切换为 **亮色主题**（白色背景）
- 亮色主题下所有颜色变量（背景、文字、链接、卡片 hover、导航栏毛玻璃等）都重新适配了浅色系
- 主题选择通过 `localStorage` 持久化保存，刷新页面后会自动恢复上次选择
- 切换时有 **0.3~0.4s 的平滑过渡动画**"},"timestamp":1773297239,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail Scholar GitHub
About Education Publications Career
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

Last updated:

option.name: question
option.value: 整体字体调大一些吧，然后背景做成白色 / 黑色可选择

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail Scholar GitHub
About Education Publications Career
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

Last updated:

{"messageId":"019ce0c42fa9769ca29d1ab0402080bb","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0c42fa9769ca29d1ab0402080bb","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"现在看清楚了。顶部吸顶导航栏的样式是：

- `.nav-brand`（左侧标题 "Jiexuan's HomePage"）：`font-size: 15px`
- `.nav-links a`（右侧 About/Education/Publications/Career）：`font-size: 15px`

而你之前说的"和左边的字体一样大一样粗"，其实是想让顶部导航栏的字体更大更粗。让我把上次误改的 hero-nav 改回去，然后正确修改顶部导航栏的样式。"},"timestamp":1773297501,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019ce0c42fa9769ca29d1ab0402080bb","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0c42fa9769ca29d1ab0402080bb","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！这次修正了上次的误改，并正确调整了**顶部吸顶导航栏**的样式：

| 元素 | 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|------|
| `.nav-brand`（左侧 "Jiexuan's HomePage"）| 15px, 700 | **22px, bold** |
| `.nav-links a`（右侧 About/Education/Publications/Career）| 15px, 无加粗 | **22px, bold** |
| `.hero-nav a`（首屏导航链接）| 28px（误改）| **恢复为 22px** |

现在顶部导航栏的左右两边字体大小和粗细一致了，都是 22px + bold。"},"timestamp":1773297515,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail Scholar GitHub
About Education Publications Career
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

Last updated:

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail Scholar GitHub
About Education Publications Career
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

Last updated:

{"messageId":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"现在我看到了相关样式。当前这三行的样式是：

- `.hero-title`（Master Student...）：`font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 30px;`
- `.hero-subtitle`（Focus:...）：`font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 6px;`
- `.hero-contact`（Contact:...）：`font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 30px;`

问题：`hero-title` 的 `margin-bottom: 30px` 太大了，导致和下面的 Focus 之间间距过大；整体字号也偏小。我来调整：

1. **字号统一放大** → 都调到 19px
2. **间距收紧** → `hero-title` 的 margin-bottom 从 30px 降到 8px，`hero-subtitle` 保持 6px，`hero-contact` 从 30px 降到 20px（和下方导航保持合理间距）"},"timestamp":1773297763,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773297772,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_yifZrdFuVFcW3t5MnLhaSR","name":"multi_replace","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeMultiReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_yifZrdFuVFcW3t5MnLhaSR","toolCallName":"multi_replace"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773297778,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_yifZrdFuVFcW3t5MnLhaSR","result":{"commit_id":["e86c6a0713b131ba2f13db13dca6f66883b40b10","aa6edb51c86f17130b245947a1f9caf246d95bd3"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","toolCallId":"tooluse_yifZrdFuVFcW3t5MnLhaSR","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0c84ecf7fc59765dbf4a31bbfa3","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！调整内容如下：

| 属性 | 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|------|
| **Master Student...** 字号 | 17px | **19px** |
| **Master Student...** 下间距 | 30px | **8px** |
| **Focus:...** 字号 | 16px | **19px** |
| **Focus:...** 下间距 | 6px | **6px**（不变） |
| **Contact:...** 字号 | 16px | **19px** |
| **Contact:...** 下间距 | 30px | **22px** |

现在这三行会更紧凑地排列在一起，字体也统一放大到了 19px，和导航栏之间保持 22px 的合理间距。刷新看看效果，如果需要进一步微调可以告诉我。"},"timestamp":1773297783,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

About Education Publications Career | Scholar GitHub
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

Last updated:

{"messageId":"019ce0ca45977813b0de0f1ee56b75dc","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0ca45977813b0de0f1ee56b75dc","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！调整内容如下：

| 属性 | 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|------|
| **头像尺寸（桌面端）** | 130px × 130px | **170px × 170px** |
| **头像下方间距** | 20px | **24px** |
| **头像尺寸（移动端）** | 无特殊处理 | **140px × 140px** |

头像放大了约 30%，视觉上会更醒目，同时保持了圆形裁切和阴影效果。移动端也做了适配，不会过大撑满屏幕。刷新看看效果，如果觉得还需要微调可以告诉我。"},"timestamp":1773297949,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

E-mail / Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

{"messageId":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"现在我看到了 Education 部分的代码。两个学校的 logo 图片（`pku.png` 和 `BUAA.png`）使用的是 `.logo` 类，CSS 中定义为 `height: 70px`，但没有固定宽度。由于两张图片的原始宽高比可能不同，导致它们在视觉上长度不一致。\n\n解决方案是给 `.logo` 设置固定的宽度，确保两个图标在水平方向上大小一致，同时使用 `object-fit: contain` 保持比例不变形。"},"timestamp":1773298361,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773298366,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_iGDjo6j3jQgc47MVwFC2eO","name":"replace_in_file","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_iGDjo6j3jQgc47MVwFC2eO","toolCallName":"replace_in_file"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_iGDjo6j3jQgc47MVwFC2eO","document":{"file_path":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html","sub_content":"index.html","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html","sub_content_tip":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html","old_string":" .list-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px; }\n .list-item .logo { height: 70px; border-radius: 8px; }","new_string":" .list-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px; }\n .list-item .logo { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 8px; object-fit: contain; }","apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1773298366,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773298371,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_iGDjo6j3jQgc47MVwFC2eO","result":{"commit_id":["91abd3a6b790b6fb3b73f19ec283caf9c6edc979","53f799448a78cebaf9ddc9b560c2f2937ffb95f9"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","toolCallId":"tooluse_iGDjo6j3jQgc47MVwFC2eO","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0d1149d7a348251474c6d206516","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"已修改完成！主要改动：

- 给 `.list-item .logo` 添加了固定的 `width: 70px`（与 `height: 70px` 一致），形成一个正方形的图标区域
- 添加了 `object-fit: contain`，确保图片在固定区域内保持原始比例不变形

这样 PKU 和 BUAA 两个学校的图标在水平宽度上会保持一致，看起来会整齐很多。刷新页面看看效果吧！"},"timestamp":1773298377,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

About Education Publications Career | Scholar GitHub
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Image/Video Generation, Diffusion Models

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training

{"messageId":"019ce0d2e31a7152957347a03213fad8","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0d2e31a7152957347a03213fad8","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"没有其他地方需要同步修改。修改已完成！

调整内容如下：

| 属性 | 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|------|
| **宽度** | 70px（正方形） | **160px**（长方形，自适应比例） |
| **高度** | 70px（固定） | **auto**（自适应，最大 60px） |
| **最小宽度** | 无 | **160px**（确保两个 logo 对齐） |
| **显示方式** | `object-fit: contain` 被压在正方形里 | 自然比例展示 |

两张图的实际尺寸分别是 580×189（PKU）和 674×149（BUAA），都是宽长方形，现在它们会在 160px 宽度内按各自的宽高比自然显示，不再被压缩成正方形了。刷新页面看看效果吧！"},"timestamp":1773298520,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

{"messageId":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"我已经看到了完整的文件内容。现在来分析两个问题：

### 1. 默认日间模式
当前主题切换逻辑（约第671行）：`const savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'dark'`，默认是 `dark`，需要改为 `light`。

### 2. 自动滑动 bug
在文件底部（约第686行），有一个"首屏吸附滚动效果"的脚本。这段代码监听了 `scroll` 事件，当用户从顶部往下滑动超过 30px 但没到半个屏幕高度时，就自动 `scrollIntoView` 到 `#about`。这就是导致下滑后自动跳转的 bug。

问题在于：
- 当用户只是小幅滚动或者想查看中间位置时，会被强制跳到 about section
- `hasScrolledPastHero` 逻辑不完善——只要回到顶部就重置，又会再次触发
- 触发阈值太低（30px），很容易误触

这个吸附逻辑设计有缺陷，用户往下一滑就被自动跳走了。最好的做法是去掉这个强制吸附行为，改用更温和的方式（或完全去掉）。

我来一次性修复这两个问题："},"timestamp":1773299298,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773299308,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_rC9OQSUITbJCwJjEUgkP6i","name":"multi_replace","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeMultiReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_rC9OQSUITbJCwJjEUgkP6i","toolCallName":"multi_replace"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773299316,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_rC9OQSUITbJCwJjEUgkP6i","result":{"commit_id":["dd9d3327568ad0e928e62b44f69990a3f197e7ea","fe11f750916fad453f1022c7370f43eae5303c33"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","toolCallId":"tooluse_rC9OQSUITbJCwJjEUgkP6i","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0dfb85e7575a391f165bb66ab85","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！总结一下做了两处改动：

### 1. 默认切换为日间模式
将主题默认值从 `'dark'` 改为 `'light'`。现在首次访问（或没有缓存 localStorage 时）会默认显示亮色主题。已经手动选过主题的用户则依然保持他们的选择。

### 2. 修复自动滑动 bug
移除了底部的**首屏吸附滚动脚本**。那段代码的逻辑是：当用户从首屏往下滚动超过 30px 时，就自动将页面强制跳转到 `#about` section。这个阈值太低，导致用户稍微一滑就被"吸"走，体验很差。现在滚动行为完全由用户自己控制，首屏的"下滑箭头"点击后仍然会平滑跳转到 About 部分（通过 `<a href="#about">` 实现），功能不受影响。"},"timestamp":1773299320,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

\\n\\n \\n \\n\\n \\n\\n \\n\\n \\n\\n\\n\\n\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"27.55 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 681}"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"现在我了解了当前文件内容。之前的吸附滚动脚本已经被移除了。我需要重新加入一个改进版本的吸附滚动逻辑，修复之前的 bug。

之前代码的问题分析：
1. **滚动阈值太低**（30px），鼠标轻轻一动就触发
2. **在 scroll 事件中触发**，会和用户正常滚动冲突，导致"自动滑动"的 bug——用户可能在反向滚动时又被吸走
3. **没有区分用户主动滚动和程序触发的滚动**

改进方案：使用 `wheel` 事件（滚轮事件）来检测用户主动向下滚动意图，只在首屏且首次向下滚时吸附到 about section，这样不会出现反复触发的 bug。"},"timestamp":1773299399,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773299407,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_3UMUHqh0AjBXxocuR1AU2n","name":"replace_in_file","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_3UMUHqh0AjBXxocuR1AU2n","toolCallName":"replace_in_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773299418,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_3UMUHqh0AjBXxocuR1AU2n","result":{"commit_id":["b7c8e39aca7c9cf35438bffd33faba102e9ae36e","83fba42735c74eebf8d8557502699ef6b2dc5e1e"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","toolCallId":"tooluse_3UMUHqh0AjBXxocuR1AU2n","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e129b876189c1eafcb755fe7d2","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！重新加入了改进后的首屏吸附滚动效果，修复了以下 bug：

### 改进点

1. **使用 `wheel` 事件代替 `scroll` 事件**：只有用户主动滚动鼠标滚轮向下时才触发吸附，避免了程序触发的滚动（如 `scrollIntoView`）再次被监听到，从而消除"自动连锁滑动"的问题。

2. **限制触发区域**：只在 `scrollY < 30%` 视口高度时触发，意味着只有在首屏顶部区域向下滚时才会吸附，不会在页面中间位置误触发。

3. **单次触发锁定**：`hasSnapped` 标志确保每次进入首屏只触发一次吸附，不会反复跳动。滚回到页面顶部（`scrollY === 0`）后才重置，允许再次触发。

4. **移动端支持**：通过 `touchstart`/`touchend` 事件处理触屏设备的向下滑动手势，同样的逻辑。

5. **防抖保护**：`isSnapping` 在吸附动画期间（1秒）锁住，防止动画过程中重复触发。"},"timestamp":1773299423,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

{"messageId":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"\n\n让我先读取当前的文件内容，看看现在的吸附滚动脚本具体是什么样的。"},"timestamp":1773299468,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773299470,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_OocEh8Fm26VzVTdR6TFLZv","name":"read_file","ch_name":"读取文件","display_name":"读取文件中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_OocEh8Fm26VzVTdR6TFLZv","toolCallName":"read_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1773299471,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_OocEh8Fm26VzVTdR6TFLZv","document":{"sub_content":"index.html","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html","sub_content_tip":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html"}},"toolCallId":"tooluse_OocEh8Fm26VzVTdR6TFLZv","delta":"{\"explanation\": \"读取当前index.html，查看吸附滚动脚本的最新代码，分析残留的bug。\", \"path\": \"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html\", \"offset\": 680, \"limit\": 50}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773299471,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_OocEh8Fm26VzVTdR6TFLZv","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","toolCallId":"tooluse_OocEh8Fm26VzVTdR6TFLZv","content":"{\"content\": \"... 679 lines before line 680 ...\\n // 首屏吸附滚动效果（改进版）\\n document.addEventListener(\\\"DOMContentLoaded\\\", function() {\\n let hasSnapped = false;\\n let isSnapping = false;\\n\\n // 使用 wheel 事件检测用户主动向下滚动意图\\n window.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {\\n // 仅在首屏范围内、用户向下滚动、且尚未吸附过时触发\\n if (e.deltaY > 0 && !hasSnapped && !isSnapping && window.scrollY < window.innerHeight * 0.3) {\\n hasSnapped = true;\\n isSnapping = true;\\n document.getElementById('about').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\\n setTimeout(() => { isSnapping = false; }, 1000);\\n }\\n }, { passive: true });\\n\\n // 同样处理触屏的向下滑动\\n let touchStartY = 0;\\n window.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\\n touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;\\n }, { passive: true });\\n\\n window.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\\n const touchEndY = e.changedTouches[0].clientY;\\n const deltaY = touchStartY - touchEndY; // 正值表示向上滑（即页面向下滚）\\n if (deltaY > 30 && !hasSnapped && !isSnapping && window.scrollY < window.innerHeight * 0.3) {\\n hasSnapped = true;\\n isSnapping = true;\\n document.getElementById('about').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\\n setTimeout(() => { isSnapping = false; }, 1000);\\n }\\n }, { passive: true });\\n\\n // 当用户回到首屏顶部时，重置状态，允许再次吸附\\n window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {\\n if (window.scrollY === 0) {\\n hasSnapped = false;\\n }\\n }, { passive: true });\\n });\\n </script>\\n\\n\\n</body>\\n</html>\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"29.25 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 724}"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"现在我明白问题所在了。当前的方案虽然比之前好了不少，但仍有问题：

1. **`wheel` 事件可能连续触发多次**——用户滚一下鼠标，`wheel` 事件可能触发多次（尤其是触控板），虽然有 `hasSnapped` 锁，但 `scrollIntoView` 的 smooth 动画过程中页面在滚动，`scrollY` 会变化，可能导致吸附动画和用户后续滚动冲突产生抖动。
2. **`isSnapping` 超时 1 秒可能不够**——smooth scroll 动画时间不固定，可能还没滚完就解锁了。
3. **吸附后用户继续滚动会和 smooth scroll 动画冲突**，导致页面"拉扯"。

改进方案：
- 吸附触发后，使用 `scrollTo` 并监听 `scrollend` 事件（或用定时检测 scroll 停止）来精确判断动画结束
- 在吸附动画期间阻止用户的 wheel 事件传播（使用非 passive 的事件监听器）
- 增加一个更可靠的机制"},"timestamp":1773299476,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773299484,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_Ws0pogh60ni6IASZR3wvs6","name":"replace_in_file","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_Ws0pogh60ni6IASZR3wvs6","toolCallName":"replace_in_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773299498,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_Ws0pogh60ni6IASZR3wvs6","result":{"commit_id":["879be358b059935db0f4bfd7a2fdc6856bd39953","93380974bedd0ed8ddf1b19144ebc8400dfa9fe5"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","toolCallId":"tooluse_Ws0pogh60ni6IASZR3wvs6","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e2530e7ec389cec4a50dbda8ba","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！这个 v2 版本做了以下关键改进：

### 修复点

1. **吸附期间锁定页面滚动**：触发吸附后立即设置 `overflow: hidden`，阻止用户在 smooth scroll 动画期间继续滚动导致的"拉扯"和抖动。动画完成后再恢复。

2. **`preventDefault` 阻止默认滚动**：将 `wheel` 事件改为 `passive: false`，在吸附触发时和动画期间调用 `e.preventDefault()`，彻底阻止浏览器默认的滚轮滚动行为，避免和 `scrollTo` 动画冲突。

3. **精确检测动画结束**：不再用固定的 1 秒超时，而是每 20ms 检查 `scrollY` 是否停止变化，一旦滚动停止就立即解锁，最多等 1.2 秒（兜底），比硬编码超时更可靠。

4. **延迟重置 `hasSnapped`**：用户回到顶部时延迟 300ms 再重置，防止滚动回弹时误触发重置，避免再次意外吸附。

5. **触屏 `touchmove` 也做了阻止**：动画期间阻止触屏设备的滑动，保持一致性。

你可以试试现在的效果，应该不会再有抖动或冲突了。"},"timestamp":1773299503,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"\n\n让我先读取当前的吸附滚动脚本代码，了解现在的具体实现。"},"timestamp":1773299547,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773299547,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_VyFA3g9zy70tkEzZ0yLe2c","name":"read_file","ch_name":"读取文件","display_name":"读取文件中","render_type":"None","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_VyFA3g9zy70tkEzZ0yLe2c","toolCallName":"read_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1773299550,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_VyFA3g9zy70tkEzZ0yLe2c","document":{"sub_content":"index.html","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html","sub_content_tip":"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html"}},"toolCallId":"tooluse_VyFA3g9zy70tkEzZ0yLe2c","delta":"{\"explanation\": \"读取当前index.html文件末尾的吸附滚动脚本，了解当前实现细节。\", \"path\": \"/Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io/index.html\", \"offset\": 680, \"limit\": 90}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773299550,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_VyFA3g9zy70tkEzZ0yLe2c","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","toolCallId":"tooluse_VyFA3g9zy70tkEzZ0yLe2c","content":"{\"content\": \"... 679 lines before line 680 ...\\n // 首屏吸附滚动效果（改进版 v2）\\n document.addEventListener(\\\"DOMContentLoaded\\\", function() {\\n let hasSnapped = false;\\n let isSnapping = false;\\n const aboutEl = document.getElementById('about');\\n\\n function doSnap() {\\n if (hasSnapped || isSnapping) return;\\n hasSnapped = true;\\n isSnapping = true;\\n\\n // 禁用页面滚动，防止动画期间用户滚动导致冲突\\n document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';\\n document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';\\n\\n const targetY = aboutEl.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY;\\n window.scrollTo({ top: targetY, behavior: 'smooth' });\\n\\n // 检测滚动动画完成\\n let checkCount = 0;\\n let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;\\n const checkDone = setInterval(() => {\\n checkCount++;\\n if (Math.abs(window.scrollY - lastScrollY) < 1 || checkCount > 60) {\\n // 滚动停止或超过 1.2 秒，解除锁定\\n clearInterval(checkDone);\\n document.body.style.overflow = '';\\n document.documentElement.style.overflow = '';\\n isSnapping = false;\\n }\\n lastScrollY = window.scrollY;\\n }, 20);\\n }\\n\\n // 使用 wheel 事件检测用户主动向下滚动意图\\n window.addEventListener('wheel', function(e) {\\n if (isSnapping) {\\n e.preventDefault();\\n return;\\n }\\n if (e.deltaY > 0 && !hasSnapped && window.scrollY < window.innerHeight * 0.3) {\\n e.preventDefault();\\n doSnap();\\n }\\n }, { passive: false });\\n\\n // 触屏设备处理\\n let touchStartY = 0;\\n window.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\\n touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY;\\n }, { passive: true });\\n\\n window.addEventListener('touchmove', function(e) {\\n if (isSnapping) {\\n e.preventDefault();\\n }\\n }, { passive: false });\\n\\n window.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\\n const touchEndY = e.changedTouches[0].clientY;\\n const deltaY = touchStartY - touchEndY;\\n if (deltaY > 30 && !hasSnapped && !isSnapping && window.scrollY < window.innerHeight * 0.3) {\\n doSnap();\\n }\\n }, { passive: true });\\n\\n // 当用户回到首屏顶部时，重置状态，允许再次吸附\\n let resetTimer = null;\\n window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {\\n if (isSnapping) return;\\n if (window.scrollY === 0) {\\n // 延迟重置，避免回弹时立即触发\\n clearTimeout(resetTimer);\\n resetTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n if (window.scrollY === 0) {\\n hasSnapped = false;\\n }\\n }, 300);\\n }\\n }, { passive: true });\\n });\\n </script>\\n\\n\\n</body>\\n</html>\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"30.32 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 765}"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"明白了，问题在于：当前代码在吸附动画结束后（`isSnapping = false`），解除了 `overflow: hidden`，此时用户在动画期间积累的滚轮事件或继续滚动的动量会让页面一下子滑到很下面。

核心原因是：
1. 吸附动画完成后解锁时，浏览器可能还有残余的滚动动量（尤其是 Mac 触控板的惯性滚动）
2. 虽然 `wheel` 事件在 `isSnapping` 期间被 `preventDefault` 了，但解锁瞬间如果用户还在滚，新的 wheel 事件就不再被拦截了

解决方案：在吸附动画完成后，**再额外保持一小段时间的 wheel 事件拦截**，让触控板的惯性滚动消散，同时只拦截大幅度的滚动，允许小幅度正常滚动。"},"timestamp":1773299555,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773299561,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_6nUYa0PbhjdgakfhCArLgo","name":"replace_in_file","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_6nUYa0PbhjdgakfhCArLgo","toolCallName":"replace_in_file"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773299579,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_6nUYa0PbhjdgakfhCArLgo","result":{"commit_id":["d78a5ffa6330cf0f4dd5fc4b8657f8756d4dd800","96e7f41c70176378c01cf247f2950a8b90c8f550"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","toolCallId":"tooluse_6nUYa0PbhjdgakfhCArLgo","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0e3991a7401aed8004e0f53dac0","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！这个 v3 版本新增了一个**冷却期机制**来解决你说的问题：

### 问题原因

吸附动画结束后解除 `overflow: hidden` 的瞬间，Mac 触控板（或鼠标）的**惯性滚动**残余动量还没消散，浏览器立刻把这些积攒的滚动量释放出来，导致页面一下子滑到很下面。

### 修复方案

新增 `isCoolingDown`（冷却期）状态：

- 吸附动画完成后，进入 **800ms 的冷却期**
- 冷却期间，向下的较大幅度滚轮事件（`deltaY > 5`）仍会被 `preventDefault` 拦截
- 这段时间足以让触控板的惯性滚动衰减消散
- 向上滚动和极小幅度的滚动不受影响，保持交互自然
- 冷却期结束后完全恢复正常滚动

你现在试试，吸附到 About 页后应该不会再"冲"到很下面了。"},"timestamp":1773299583,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

{"messageId":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"现在我清楚问题了：

1. **颜色问题**：`.filter-btn.active` 的背景色是 `var(--link-hover)`（暗色主题下是 `#ffac4d` 橙黄色，亮色下是 `#e06c00` 橙色），文字色是 `#000`。而未选中的按钮是半透明灰色。这和页面整体蓝色调（链接色 `#3098ff` / `#0969da`）不太搭配。应该让标签按钮颜色更协调。

2. **间距问题**：`.filter-controls` 有 `margin-bottom: 30px`，而且有嵌套的两层 `.filter-controls`，这导致间距可能叠加。

让我修复这两个问题："},"timestamp":1773300385,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_START","timestamp":1773300389,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_HSlFpGkh37vgbNloQ7o5N1","name":"multi_replace","ch_name":"编辑文件","display_name":"编辑文件中","render_type":"CodeMultiReplace","default_show":false,"need_result":true},"toolCallId":"tooluse_HSlFpGkh37vgbNloQ7o5N1","toolCallName":"multi_replace"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773300411,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_LyCH1CutCmk8cIjBsrP433","result":{"commit_id":["2103a3001a04d184bbe048f5351946b836da09ce","a0bf5ce09759228e58c92c060f9105d7b47713fe"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","toolCallId":"tooluse_LyCH1CutCmk8cIjBsrP433","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0f0003578c6bc2a0819caa30b4c","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！做了以下调整：

### 1. 颜色调整 — 与页面主色调统一

| 状态 | 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|------|
| **默认** | 半透明白/黑灰色 | 淡蓝色背景 + 蓝色边框 |
| **悬停** | 稍深的灰色 | 稍深的蓝色 |
| **选中 (active)** | 橙黄色背景 `#ffac4d` + 黑字 | 蓝色调背景 + 蓝色文字 + 蓝色边框 |

暗色主题下使用 `#3098ff` 蓝色系，亮色主题下使用 `#0969da` 蓝色系，和页面的链接色、标题色保持一致。

### 2. 间距调整

- `filter-controls` 的 `margin-bottom` 从 **30px** 缩小到 **12px**
- 去掉了嵌套的两层 `.filter-controls`（之前有双层 margin 叠加），现在只有一层

刷新页面看看效果吧！"},"timestamp":1773300416,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Diffusion Model, Image&Video Generation, Post-Training

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

About Education Publications Career | Scholar GitHub
JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Diffusion Model, Image&Video Generation, Post-Training

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

Peking University
Master Student in Computer Science
Advisor: Prof. Jian Zhang
Sep. 2024 - Present
Beihang University
Bachelor Student in Software Engineering, Shenyuan Honor College
Sep. 2020 - Jul. 2024

Publications

NeurIPS 2025

AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang

NeurIPS, 2025

arXiv / Project Page / Code

Aligning style across multiple generated images with reference-based diffusion approach.

CVPR 2026 Main

DRM: Diffusion-based Reward Model With Step-wise Guidance

Jiexuan Zhang, Binxin Yang, Hubery Yin, Chen Li, Jing Lv

CVPR, 2026 Main

Diffusion-based reward model can provide more accurate score.

Career

Tencent WeChat Vision
Research Intern, focus on Video Generation, Data Process, Post Training
Mentor: Binxin Yang
May. 2025 - Present

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773301414,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0ffbf3872e8ab82762e9f9604d2","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_4ZEhNIidgqAYTHfV8wr0Ic","result":{"commit_id":["7be853d2f83c91ef26b032aaa2a394e75e4e513e","7c178f946278f943d41561921ea1f2dc89081455"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019ce0ffbf3872e8ab82762e9f9604d2","toolCallId":"tooluse_4ZEhNIidgqAYTHfV8wr0Ic","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019ce0ffbf3872e8ab82762e9f9604d2","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce0ffbf3872e8ab82762e9f9604d2","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！做了以下两处改动：

### 1. 新增筛选标签

在 `All`、`Generation`、`Diffusion` 后面增加了 **AlignedGen** 按钮：

```html
<button class="filter-btn" data-filter="alignedgen">AlignedGen</button>
```

### 2. 论文标签更新

给 AlignedGen 论文的 `data-tags` 增加了 `alignedgen` 分类：

```html
<article class="pub-item" data-tags="generation, diffusion, alignedgen">
```

这样点击 **AlignedGen** 标签时，只会显示 AlignedGen 这篇论文；而 `All`、`Generation`、`Diffusion` 标签仍然会按原来的逻辑显示对应论文。现有的筛选 JS 逻辑无需修改，因为它是通过匹配 `data-tags` 中是否包含对应关键词来过滤的。"},"timestamp":1773301419,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773301480,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce1012e9b700e9b1d61dde2f95348","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"3359b32f-1eb0-4cc3-a9d6-7d7f20d160ec","display_name":"任务规划完成"},"messageId":"019ce1012e9b700e9b1d61dde2f95348","toolCallId":"3359b32f-1eb0-4cc3-a9d6-7d7f20d160ec","content":""}

{"messageId":"019ce1012e9b700e9b1d61dde2f95348","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce1012e9b700e9b1d61dde2f95348","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"我理解了，你的意思是你只有一个 GitHub Pages 仓库（`Jiexuanz.github.io`），但需要在这个仓库里同时部署多个网页，比如：

- 个人主页（当前的 `index.html`）
- **AlignedGen** 项目的专属页面
- 未来可能还有其他项目页面

这是一个很常见的需求。有几种方案可以实现：

---

### 方案一：子目录方式（推荐）

在仓库中为每个项目创建子目录，每个目录放一个独立的 `index.html`：

```
Jiexuanz.github.io/
├── index.html ← 个人主页 (jiexuanz.github.io)
├── alignedgen/
│ └── index.html ← AlignedGen 项目页 (jiexuanz.github.io/alignedgen/)
├── drm/
│ └── index.html ← DRM 项目页 (jiexuanz.github.io/drm/)
└── ...
```

- 访问 `https://jiexuanz.github.io/` → 个人主页
- 访问 `https://jiexuanz.github.io/alignedgen/` → AlignedGen 项目页
- 每个子目录的页面完全独立，互不影响

### 方案二：多个 HTML 文件

不用子目录，直接在根目录放多个 HTML 文件：

```
Jiexuanz.github.io/
├── index.html ← 个人主页
├── alignedgen.html ← AlignedGen 项目页 (jiexuanz.github.io/alignedgen.html)
└── drm.html ← DRM 项目页
```

---

### 建议

**方案一（子目录方式）**更好，因为：
- URL 更简洁美观（`/alignedgen/` vs `/alignedgen.html`）
- 每个项目页可以有自己独立的静态资源（图片、CSS、JS）
- 结构清晰，便于管理

---

你想要我用哪种方案来帮你搭建 **AlignedGen** 的项目页面？如果选方案一，我可以直接创建 `alignedgen/index.html`，并在主页的论文列表里添加指向该页面的链接。你有现成的 AlignedGen 项目页内容/设计要求吗？"},"timestamp":1773301489,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

About Me

\\n
\\n

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

\\n

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

\\n

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

\\n
\\n
\\n\\n \\n
\\n

\\n\\n

1. **确保主页 `index.html` 中 AlignedGen 论文的 Project Page 链接指向 `./AlignedGen/`**（而非外部 URL）
2. **给 AlignedGen 论文加上 `alignedgen` 标签并保留筛选按钮**

让我检查当前主页中 AlignedGen 的链接：

主页中 AlignedGen 论文的 Project Page 链接是 `https://jiexuanz.github.io/AlignedGen/`，这个链接在 GitHub Pages 部署后会自动指向 `AlignedGen/index.html`，所以**链接已经是正确的**。

那现在已经完全就绪了！`AlignedGen/` 子目录下有完整的项目页面和静态资源，主页的链接也指向了正确的地址。部署到 GitHub Pages 后：

- `https://jiexuanz.github.io/` → 你的个人主页（根目录 `index.html`）
- `https://jiexuanz.github.io/AlignedGen/` → AlignedGen 项目页面（`AlignedGen/index.html`）

不过我注意到 AlignedGen 的 `index.html` 中有几个小问题需要修复，确保它在子目录部署下也能正常工作。让我检查一下 JS 和 CSS 的引用路径：

AlignedGen 页面中的资源引用都是用相对路径 `./static/...`，这在 `AlignedGen/` 子目录下是正确的。但 `index.html` 中的一些 CSS 有问题（比如裸 `@media` 块中的 `width: 95%` 没有选择器），我帮你清理一下。

另外，AlignedGen 页面中缺少一个**返回主页**的导航按钮，方便用户从项目页回到你的个人主页。我来补上："},"timestamp":1773301575,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

主页中 AlignedGen 论文的 **Project Page** 链接已经指向 `https://jiexuanz.github.io/AlignedGen/`，无需额外修改。未来如果有新项目页面，只需在根目录创建新的子目录（如 `DRM/`）即可。"},"timestamp":1773301602,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

entry.value:
AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images

NeurIPS 2025

TL;DR: Input a set of prompts, AlignedGen can generate images with consist style.

Jiexuan Zhang, Yiheng Du, Qian Wang, Weiqi Li, Yu Gu, Jian Zhang
Peking University
Corresponding author
Paper Code

Case Show

Explore generated results with corresponding prompts.

{Rhino, Telescope, Stool, Panda} in vintage stamp style.
{A bear, A moose, A cute koala, A baby penguin} in kid crayon drawing style.
{A serene river, A rowboat, A bridge, A willow tree} in 3D render, animation studio style.
{A penguin, A bicycle, A tornado, A pineapple} in abstract graffiti style.
{A robot, A cupcake, A woman playing bascketball, A sunflower} in digital glitch art style.
{A kite surfing, A pizza, A child doing homework, A person doing yoga} in fluid art style.
{Hiking boots, Kangaroo, Ice cream cone, Hammock} in comic book style.
{Tree stump, Harp, Chameleon, Canyon} in blueprint style.
{Crystal ball, Carousel horse, Hummingbird, Glacier} in watercolor and ink wash style.
{Anchor, Clock, Globe, Bicycle} in 3D realism style.
{Clock, Helicopter, Whale, Starfish} in retro poster style.
{Binoculars, Bus, Pillow, Cloud} in bohemian hand-drawn style.
{lighthouse, book, cityscape, cat} in isometric illustration style.
{camera, fireman, house, mountain} in doodle style.
{lighthouse, book, cityscape, cat} in sticker style.
{lighthouse, book, cityscape, cat} in expressionism style.

Abstract

Despite their generative power, diffusion models struggle to maintain style consistency across images conditioned on the same style prompt, hindering their practical deployment in creative workflows. While several training-free methods attempt to solve this, they are constrained to the U-Net architecture, which not only leads to low-quality results and artifacts like object repetition but also renders them incompatible with superior Diffusion Transformer (DiT). To address these issues, we introduce AlignedGen, a novel training-free framework that enhances style consistency across images generated by DiT models. Our work first reveals a critical insight: naive attention sharing fails in DiT due to conflicting positional signals from improper position embeddings. We introduce Shifted Position Embedding (ShiftPE), an effective solution that resolves this conflict by allocating a non-overlapping set of positional indices to each image. Building on this foundation, we develop Advanced Attention Sharing (AAS), a suite of three techniques meticulously designed to fully unleash the potential of attention sharing within the DiT. Furthermore, to broaden the applicability of our method, we present an efficient query, key, and value feature extraction algorithm, enabling our method to seamlessly incorporate external images as style references.

Method

Overview of the AlignedGen framework. (a) Overall pipeline, where our ShiftPE and AAS module are integrated into specific layers of DiT, replacing the MM-Attention. (b)(c) Detailed illustrations of the ShiftPE and AAS, respectively. (d) Procedure for extracting features from a user-provided style reference image, which serve as input to the AAS module.

ShiftPE Analysis

ShiftPE decouples attention from spatial location to enable semantic correspondence. We visualize attention map originating from a query point (red box). (a) RoPE exhibits a strong spatial bias, rigidly constraining attention to the same coordinates in the reference image and causing content leakage. (b) ShiftPE breaks this spatial dependency, allowing attention to focus on broader, semantically relevant regions (e.g., the surrounding snowy landscape). (c) The plot of attention weight summed by L1 distance quantitatively confirms this: ShiftPE distributes attention across a wider area, whereas RoPE's attention is sharply localized at the query's exact coordinates.

Compare With Others

Support User-Provided Image As Reference

DreamBooth

Depth Control

BibTeX

@article{zhang2025alignedgen,
  title={AlignedGen: Aligning Style Across Generated Images},
  author={Zhang, Jiexuan and Du, Yiheng and Wang, Qian and Li, Weiqi and Gu, Yu and Zhang, Jian},
  journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2509.17088},
  year={2025}
}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773301666,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce10402297421af941feeee96890e","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"68765c78-2eae-4b83-99cc-1f9c60650205","display_name":"任务规划完成"},"messageId":"019ce10402297421af941feeee96890e","toolCallId":"68765c78-2eae-4b83-99cc-1f9c60650205","content":""}

{"messageId":"019ce10402297421af941feeee96890e","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce10402297421af941feeee96890e","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"你可以在本地启动一个简单的 HTTP 服务器来预览你的 GitHub Pages 网站。以下是几种方法：

---

### 方法一：Python 内置服务器（推荐，最简单）

```bash
# 在项目根目录下运行
cd /Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io
python3 -m http.server 8000
```

然后打开浏览器访问：
- **个人主页**：`http://localhost:8000/`
- **AlignedGen 项目页**：`http://localhost:8000/AlignedGen/`

按 `Ctrl+C` 停止服务器。

---

### 方法二：使用 Node.js 的 `npx serve`

如果你安装了 Node.js：

```bash
npx serve /Users/zjx/Desktop/Projects/Jiexuanz.github.io
```

---

### 方法三：使用 VS Code 的 Live Server 插件

1. 安装 **Live Server** 扩展
2. 右键点击 `index.html` → "Open with Live Server"
3. 它会自动打开浏览器，并且修改文件后**自动刷新**

---

### 验证清单

启动服务器后，建议检查以下几点：

| 检查项 | 访问地址 |
|--------|----------|
| ✅ 主页正常加载 | `http://localhost:8000/` |
| ✅ AlignedGen 项目页正常 | `http://localhost:8000/AlignedGen/` |
| ✅ 主页点击 AlignedGen 的 "Project Page" 能跳转 | 主页论文列表中的链接 |
| ✅ AlignedGen 页面的 "Back to Homepage" 能返回主页 | 项目页左上角导航 |
| ✅ AlignedGen 页面图片轮播正常 | 项目页中的图片展示 |
| ✅ 404 页面 | `http://localhost:8000/不存在的路径` |

要我帮你直接启动服务器吗？"},"timestamp":1773301674,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019ce14e296b78898eae4e9e809cf8c1","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019ce14e296b78898eae4e9e809cf8c1","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！主要做了两处改动：

### CSS 样式
- 给 `.scroll-indicator` 添加了 `width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%` 让它变成圆形
- 加了 `border: 1.5px solid var(--text-secondary)` 画出圆圈边框
- 用 `display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center` 让箭头居中
- hover 时圆圈边框颜色也跟着变成 `var(--link-hover)`（橙色）

### HTML 图标
- 箭头 SVG 从 `24x24` 缩小到 `20x20`，在圆圈内比例更协调

最终效果：一个带圆圈边框的下滑箭头按钮，hover 时箭头和圈同时变色，保持上下弹跳动画。你可以刷新本地预览看看效果。"},"timestamp":1773306561,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1773901926,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d04cb1265720299dc4e4e540c9d2f","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","tool_call_id":"tooluse_RSOdaMCQR1cAmFbXPZozsE","result":{"commit_id":["a7a743dc5441499f3966fdd752cd2dbc6c966631","2731550b8dd01663fe11b6e6fa03d2ffcc939d8c"],"full_content":"*File replaced success*"},"display_name":"编辑文件"},"messageId":"019d04cb1265720299dc4e4e540c9d2f","toolCallId":"tooluse_RSOdaMCQR1cAmFbXPZozsE","content":"*File replaced success*"}

{"messageId":"019d04cb1265720299dc4e4e540c9d2f","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019d04cb1265720299dc4e4e540c9d2f","conversation_id":"019ce0b2bc5575239725bf81fcda9410","content":"修改完成！我做了两处改动：

### 1. Footer 区域
在 "Last updated" 后面添加了两个统计指标，用 `·` 分隔：

- **Visitors**（`site_uv`）：访客数（按独立访客 UV 统计）
- **Views**（`site_pv`）：总浏览量（按页面浏览 PV 统计）

### 2. 引入不蒜子脚本
在 `<script>` 区域之前加入了不蒜子的 JS 文件：
```html
<script async src="//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js"></script>
```

**不蒜子**是一个免费、无需注册的轻量级访客统计服务，它会自动识别页面上 `id` 为 `busuanzi_value_site_uv` 和 `busuanzi_value_site_pv` 的元素，并将对应的数据填入其中。部署到线上后（GitHub Pages 等），统计数据就会自动生效。在本地预览时数据可能不会显示，属于正常现象。"},"timestamp":1773901930,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

JIEXUAN ZHANG'S HOMEPAGE
About Education Publications Career

Jiexuan Zhang - 张杰宣

Master Student @Peking University, Beijing

Focus: Diffusion Model, Image&Video Generation, Post-Training

Contact: jiexuan@stu.pku.edu.cn

Scholar / GitHub

About Me

Hi, I'm Jiexuan Zhang, a Master student at Peking University, advised by Prof. Jian Zhang.

Prior to that, I received my B.Eng degree (2020-2024) from Beihang University, Shenyuan Honor College, majoring in Software Engineering.

My research interests include Image / Video Generation and Diffusion Models, with a focus on post-training techniques and controllable generation.

Education
